location: Dropped by sword-wielding Wandering Nobles — most reliably from the troll-pulled caravan traveling the road north of Agheel Lake South (near Waypoint Ruins), Limgrave. Also drops from Wandering Nobles elsewhere (Raya Lucaria Academy courtyard, a Caelid graveyard, the road to Church of Pilgrimage, and east of the Bridge of Iniquity).
tactics: Stop the troll-pulled carriage caravan on the road near Agheel Lake by attacking one of the two trolls pulling it first.
Only Wandering Nobles wielding a sword and wearing Aristocrat Garb (Altered)/Aristocrat Boots drop it — nobles dual-wielding a sword-and-torch will not.
Base drop rate is a very low 0.5%, so expect a long farming session; resting at a grace respawns the caravan.
lore: A slender, gold-plated blade carried by wealthy nobles wandering the Lands Between — light and easy to wield, prized as much for its craftsmanship as its combat use.

builds.name: Pure Dex poke
builds.why: E Strength / C Dexterity scaling and the longest reach of any straight sword in the game make it a strong pure-Dexterity thrusting option.
